title: Beer
content:
A man to whom illness was chronic,
     When told that he needed a tonic,
        Said, "O Doctor dear,
        Won't you please make it beer?"
     "No, no," said the Doc., "that's Teutonic."
meaning:
"Beer" is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
